title: The Sunken Library of Aldrath
synopsis: A scholar's expedition gone wrong. You were hired to retrieve an ancient tome from the ruins of a wizard's library that sank beneath a coastal cliff centuries ago. Now the ruins are flooded, haunted, and something old has awakened.
opening_narration:
The sea caves of the Aldrath coast glow with bioluminescent algae, casting everything in a pale blue-green light. Your rowboat grinds against a submerged stone step — the entrance to what was once the grand library of the archmage Aldrath, swallowed by the sea a hundred years ago when the cliffs gave way.

Your employer, the Historian's Guild, wants the Codex of Tides retrieved — an ancient tome said to contain the secrets of the deep ocean. Others want it too. You can already see torch-light flickering somewhere deeper in the ruins.
setting: The sunken coastal ruins of an ancient wizard's library. Flooded chambers, crumbling stone, bioluminescent sea-life, and hidden depths.

npcs.name: Researcher Mira Thorne
npcs.description: A nervous young scholar who hired you and is waiting at the surface.

npcs.name: The Tide Wraith
npcs.description: The restless spirit of Aldrath himself, bound to protect his library.

npcs.name: Salazar
npcs.description: A rival treasure hunter, ruthless but pragmatic.

special_rules: Many chambers are partially flooded — swimming checks may be required
The wraith is drawn to the use of magic
The Codex location shifts based on the tides
